summary: Completed Docker infrastructure validation and preview API regression testing for BlackieFi 3.0 microservices architecture. All 25 infrastructure file validation tests pass (100%). All 6 preview API tests pass (100%). Frontend login and dashboard verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='login-button' attribute on submit button

action_items: Add data-testid='login-button' to the login form submit button for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Demo user with income, expenses, debts, accounts, investments, savings, budget seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Docker infrastructure files validated programmatically (Docker not available in preview pod). All Dockerfiles correctly avoid lock file dependencies. All Python services install curl for health checks. Gateway-app auth middleware correctly imports config from '../config' and includes password-reset routes. Preview API endpoints working: /api/health, /api/auth/health, /api/auth/login, /api/entities/, /api/dashboard/unified

docker_compose_yaml.service_ports: PASS - auth:8001, core:8002, entity:8003, portfolio:8004, assets:8005, gateway-app:8000, nginx:8080

infrastructure_validation_results.env_template: PASS - exists with all 18+ required environment variables
infrastructure_validation_results.makefile: PASS - has all required targets: up, down, build, logs, status, test-api, reset, clean, pull, shell-* commands
